name: AI Governance Save & OpenRouter Free Rescue
changes: Persists AI Governance controls reliably on the current browser/account
Restores saved controls on the AI Governance route and emits compatibility events
Prevents governance metadata from unnecessarily inflating OpenRouter prompts during rescue
Retries OpenRouter credit prompt-limit failures with a compact prompt and openrouter/free
Keeps the rescue scoped to AI requests and leaves successful requests untouched
